assumptions.claimBoundary: votes arriving after deadline are rejected even if they were operationally intended before deadline

scenarios.label: Vote included one second before deadline
scenarios.expectedResult: vote counts, finalize after deadline may accept challenge

scenarios.label: No inclusion in final 1 hour
scenarios.expectedResult: late vote rejected, finalize may proceed without that vote

scenarios.label: No inclusion in final 6 hours
scenarios.expectedResult: late vote rejected, finalize may proceed without that vote

scenarios.label: No inclusion in final 24 hours
scenarios.expectedResult: late vote rejected, finalize may proceed without that vote

scenarios.label: Exact deadline edge
scenarios.expectedResult: vote at exact deadline is closed; finalize can proceed

scenarios.label: Finalization before delayed vote inclusion
scenarios.expectedResult: outcome locks once finalized; post-deadline vote cannot recover it
